summary: Iteration 29 Testing Complete - Fixed MapModal rendering issue in DinePage. All 4 features tested: Map Modal working (API key config needed), Inbox shows formatted descriptions, Favorites API working, LEARN tab shows personalized guides.

ui_bugs.issue: Google Maps API key invalid error - displays error message in iframe. FIXED: MapModal was not rendered inside DinePage component - moved it to correct location

action_items: Configure valid Google Maps API key in environment to enable embedded maps in MapModal
Consider adding fallback UI when Google Maps API fails (currently shows error message)
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: MapModal component was defined at line 2775 but placed OUTSIDE the DinePage component (which ends at line 1207). Moved MapModal inside DinePage before AdminQuickEdit
format_picks_description function in mira_routes.py line 22788 correctly formats picks with emojis and line breaks - working as expected
context_for_next_testing_agent: MapModal now renders inside DinePage. Google Maps API key needs configuration. LEARN panel shows personalized content based on chat context (grooming, travel, boarding topics). Inbox/Open Requests show formatted descriptions.

map_modal.details: MapModal now opens when clicking 'View on Map' on Dog Parks. Shows place name, address, and action buttons. Google Maps iframe shows API key error (config issue, not code issue)

picks_inbox_formatting.details: Inbox shows 'Concierge Product - dipali' with 'open • celebrate' status. Request details show formatted text not raw JSON. format_picks_description function properly formats with emojis

favorites_api.details: All 3 favorites endpoints tested: GET /api/favorites/{pet_id} (200), POST /api/favorites/add (200), GET /api/favorites/{pet_id}/summary (200)

learn_tab_personalization.details: LEARN tab shows 'Mystique might need this' with personalized content based on chat context. Console shows: [LEARN] Conversation context active, recent topics: [grooming, travel, boarding]

screenshots_taken: map_modal_after_click.png - Shows Marine Drive Beach,Mumbai modal with Google Maps error
learn_panel_content.png - Shows personalized LEARN content for Mystique
